hero.subtitle: A curated marketplace where extraordinary meets exceptional. Discover rare timepieces, masterpiece artworks, and vintage collectibles — all authenticated by world-class experts.

giftGuide.title: Real Finds For Real Collectors
giftGuide.subtitle: They deserve the best. We make it easy to find — from one-of-a-kind watches to bucket-list bags.

freshArrivals.title: So Much New
freshArrivals.subtitle: 10,000+ fresh finds are in (and they're really, really good).

editorial.sectionSubtitle: One unexpected texture or detail can transform an entire look.
editorial.defaultSubtitle: Discover pieces that transcend seasons. The key is investing in quality that lasts generations.

features.label: Why Choose Us
features.title: Built for Discerning Collectors
features.subtitle: Every detail of our platform is crafted to deliver a premium auction experience

authenticated.title: Expert Authentication
authenticated.description: Every item verified by certified specialists before listing. Bid with absolute confidence.

realtime.title: Real-Time Bidding
realtime.description: Millisecond-precise auction engine. Never miss a moment with instant bid updates.

transparent.title: Full Transparency
transparent.description: Complete bid history, provenance tracking, and condition reports on every piece.

secure.title: Secure Payments
secure.description: Escrow protection on every transaction. Your investment is safeguarded end-to-end.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Start Collecting in Four Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From registration to receiving your piece — a seamless experience

step1.title: Create Account
step1.description: Sign up in seconds with your email. Verify your identity to unlock full bidding privileges.

step2.title: Discover Pieces
step2.description: Browse curated collections. Each item includes detailed provenance, condition reports, and expert authentication.

step3.title: Place Your Bid
step3.description: Bid in real-time with confidence. Set automatic bids, receive instant notifications, and track your auctions.

step4.title: Win & Collect
step4.description: Secure checkout with escrow protection. Fully insured shipping ensures your treasure arrives safely.

1.name: Alexandra Chen
1.quote: The authentication process gave me complete peace of mind. I acquired a piece I had been searching for over two years — flawlessly.

2.name: Marcus Rothwell
2.quote: As a seller, the platform exposure is unmatched. My listings consistently attract serious, qualified bidders from around the world.

3.name: Sofia Bergström
3.quote: I source unique pieces for my clients here regularly. The curation quality and condition reports save me hours of due diligence.

cta.label: Start Your Collection
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of collectors worldwide. Start bidding on authenticated, extraordinary pieces today.

exclusiveOffers.title: Your Exclusive Offers
exclusiveOffers.welcomeOfferDescription: Get 10% off your first purchase with code WELCOME10

howItWorksPage.title: How It Works
howItWorksPage.subtitle: From discovery to delivery, we make collecting simple and secure.
howItWorksPage.buyersSubtitle: Whether you are a seasoned collector or first-time buyer, our platform makes it easy to find and acquire extraordinary items.

1.title: Create Your Account
1.description: Sign up in minutes with your email. Verify your identity to start bidding or selling on our platform.

2.title: Discover & Browse
2.description: Explore thousands of curated items across categories. Use filters to find exactly what you are looking for.

3.title: Place Your Bids
3.description: Set your maximum bid and let our system bid automatically, or bid manually in real-time auctions.

4.title: Win the Auction
4.description: Get notified instantly when you win. Review your purchase details and proceed to checkout.

5.title: Secure Payment
5.description: Pay securely through our protected payment system. Multiple payment options available.

6.title: Receive Your Item
6.description: Track your shipment in real-time. All items are insured and professionally packaged.

howItWorksPage.sellersSubtitle: Reach a global audience of collectors and enthusiasts. Our platform handles authentication, payments, and shipping coordination so you can focus on what matters.

1.title: List Your Item
1.description: Upload photos, write a description, and set your starting price and reserve.

2.title: Get Verified
2.description: Our experts review and authenticate your item for buyer confidence.

3.title: Watch Bids Come In
3.description: Monitor your auction in real-time and engage with potential buyers.

4.title: Complete the Sale
4.description: Ship the item using our partnered carriers and receive your payment securely.

howItWorksPage.ctaSubtitle: Join our community of collectors and sellers. Create your account today and discover your next treasure.
